readiness_levels.production-candidate: Real user/device validation exists on at least one platform and FinClaw may expose it as a guarded user-facing collector.
readiness_levels.deep-beta: Substantial collector design and tests exist, but broader real-device validation is still required.
readiness_levels.baseline+audit: Runnable local/export/package path exists with tests, manifest coverage, provenance, and evidence policy, but real account validation is not complete.
readiness_levels.baseline: Runnable baseline exists with tests, but audit coverage or real validation is incomplete.
readiness_levels.migrated-review: Migrated skill exists and must pass provenance, license, and investor-specific boundary review before broad exposure.

catalog_exclusions.reason: Generic Doubao chat export is available in collectors/generic but is not part of the FinClaw P0/P1/P2 investor-avatar catalog until investor-specific scope, evidence boundaries, and product routing are reviewed.

entries.collects: EastMoney assets, positions, executions, orders, fund flows, watchlists, notes, recent views, and local investment behavior evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: Passwords, cookies, tokens, device fingerprints, order placement, order cancellation, or raw network payloads.
entries.production_gap: Broader Windows/Linux real-device validation.

entries.collects: Tonghuashun local executions, inferred holdings, personal metadata, and read-only visible trading-page snapshots.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading passwords, order placement, order cancellation, or broker-side mutation.
entries.production_gap: More real-device validation across Windows/macOS accounts and stronger GUI snapshot coverage.

entries.collects: Tonghuashun watchlist symbols, names, groups, industries, tags, notes, added time, authorized local-scan provenance, path-level source audit, ZIP member provenance, skipped reason counts, field coverage, ths_watchlist_boundary_proof, and attention-universe Investor Wiki evidence.
entries.must_not_collect: Broker-confirmed holdings, executions, orders, fund flows, trading passwords, cookies, tokens, or sessions.
entries.production_gap: Real Tonghuashun local-store validation, default app path validation, and trade/research corroboration backtest.

entries.collects: Authorized WeChat messages, contacts, groups, compact owner-relevant chat evidence, CollectorX event package, field coverage, filter policy, source audit, and generic-to-lens evidence boundary.
entries.must_not_collect: Secrets, decrypted keys in output, unrelated raw payload dumps, or automatic investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Prepare authorized WeChat 4.x keys or supported platform path, then validate real lake output and contact/group allowlists.

entries.collects: Investment reasons, consultation objects, sentiment, bias clues, decision context, classification metadata, source policy audit, explicit source-policy gap states, WeChat dialogue surface summary, and dialogue boundary proof from already-collected WeChat events.
entries.must_not_collect: Fresh WeChat database access or non-investment chats.
entries.production_gap: Real WeChat lake validation, user-tuned contact/group/sender allowlists, and trade-adjacent backtests.

entries.collects: Authorized local file metadata: path, extension, size, modified time, source audit, extension coverage, skipped reason counts, and per-root scan results.
entries.must_not_collect: File bodies by default, whole-disk scans, credentials, or investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Windows/Linux device validation and broader private file-sample review.

entries.collects: Research reports, financial statements, valuation models, announcement notes, explicit XLS/XLSX/PPTX/DOCX/PDF content extraction, legacy XLS parser-variant audit, binary XLS xlrd availability/failure audit, extension/path/file-name/parser/research-surface/keyword authorization scope-policy audit, filtered-all readiness, path-level source audit, skipped reasons, screenshot metadata-only evidence, research document surface summary, and research corpus boundary proof.
entries.must_not_collect: Public report database crawls, unrelated private files, screenshot OCR without separate user authorization and adapter, or generic file bodies without explicit authorization.
entries.production_gap: More real PDF/XLS/XLSX/DOCX/PPTX samples, optional screenshot OCR adapter decision, real binary .xls with xlrd validation, and Wiki backtest against trades/reviews.

entries.collects: Authorized IMAP, local email scan, or local email import metadata, body previews, sender/recipient fields, message IDs, attachment refs, account/folder audit, local scan/import path-level audit, Apple Mail/Maildir/Thunderbird mbox coverage, Thunderbird .msf index skip audit, skipped file reasons, ZIP member audit, email authorization scope-policy audit with filtered-all readiness, field coverage, archive provenance, and mailbox boundary proof.
entries.must_not_collect: Full body unless explicitly authorized, attachment bodies by default, tokens, cookies, or passwords.
entries.production_gap: Register real mailbox credentials via password_env, validate real Apple Mail/Thunderbird/Maildir local roots, validate broker/IR sender matching, and run no-full-body leakage review.

entries.collects: Broker research, morning notes, roadshow invitations, IR communications, earnings announcement alerts, research attachment signals, sender-domain/body-preview/attachment boundaries, email research surface summary, and email research boundary proof.
entries.must_not_collect: Generic personal mail as investor evidence, full bodies into Wiki by default, attachment bodies, mailbox credentials, or complete mailbox-history claims.
entries.production_gap: Real mailbox validation, broader broker/IR sender backtest, and no-full-body Wiki leakage review on real mailboxes.

entries.collects: Xueqiu watchlists, symbols, groups, industries, tags, notes, followed time, archive provenance, source audit, and field coverage.
entries.must_not_collect: Broker-confirmed holdings, executions, orders, or fund flows.
entries.production_gap: Real Xueqiu account export discovery and real watchlist pagination validation.

entries.collects: Xueqiu follows, posts, comments, favorites, saved pages, owner portfolios, rebalance records, authorized browser-history visits, source browser apps, visit/typed counts, browser transition types, domain-filtered URLs, source audit, pagination marker audit, activity-boundary proof, browser-history boundary proof, pagination completeness summary, and field coverage.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading facts unless corroborated by broker sources, login secrets, or platform-wide public scraping.
entries.production_gap: Real account adapter/export workflow, real pagination coverage, broader real browser-history samples, and rate/terms boundary review.

entries.collects: Alipay, Tiantian Fund, Danjuan, Qieman, and bank-wealth holdings, transactions, asset snapshots, value fields, PnL, fees, Excel/legacy-XLS/HTML-table/PDF-statement exports, authorized HAR response bodies, platform/field/account/asset-surface/currency coverage, source/PDF/HAR audit, asset value summary, and partial asset-boundary proof strength.
entries.must_not_collect: Payment passwords, bank credentials, complete asset-boundary claims from partial input, or account mutation.
entries.production_gap: Per-platform real export, PDF statement, HAR, or read-only screen samples plus complete account-boundary proof.

entries.collects: Meeting minutes, transcripts, subtitles, participants, participant-role hints, organizer, meeting URLs, time fields, text previews, action items, decision points, risk items, mentioned symbols, attachment refs, recording refs, platform coverage, source-platform/participant/keyword scope-policy audit, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Meeting platform credentials, unrelated meetings as investor evidence, or attachment bodies by default.
entries.production_gap: Real Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom/Tencent Meeting account adapters, participant/speaker normalization, and attachment/recording pointer validation.

entries.collects: DingTalk messages, chats, contacts, file refs, meeting refs, participants, content previews, source-platform/record-kind/chat/sender/participant/keyword scope-policy audit, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Credential material, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real DingTalk export/API validation and investment-collaboration lens backtest.

entries.collects: WeCom messages, chats, contacts, file refs, meeting refs, participants, content previews, source-platform/record-kind/chat/sender/participant/keyword scope-policy audit, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Credential material, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real WeCom export/API validation and investment-collaboration lens backtest.

entries.collects: Feishu messages, chats, contacts, documents, file refs, folders, meeting refs, recording refs, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Tenant secrets, app secrets, cookies, access/refresh tokens, unauthorized workspace-wide data, file bodies by default, or direct investor conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Feishu account API/export validation, tenant permission boundary review, participant normalization, and investor lens backtest.

entries.collects: Roadshows, research meetings, investment committee records, expert calls, earnings calls, decision points, risk discussions, follow-up actions, upstream platform surface, participant roles, meeting URLs, attachment refs, recording refs, mentioned symbols, decision/action/risk item coverage, meeting-minutes boundary proof, and decision/action boundary proof.
entries.must_not_collect: Unrelated operational meetings as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: Real Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom/Tencent Meeting artifacts, participant/speaker identity normalization, attachment/recording reference validation, and false-positive review.

entries.collects: Obsidian Markdown/Canvas, Notion, Youdao, Evernote/Yinxiang, Markdown, HTML, JSON, CSV/TSV, ENEX, and ZIP note previews with tags, paths, URLs, source-app/path/tag authorization filters, note source-policy audit, platform coverage, table/Canvas import audit, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, ZIP member audit, and content policy.
entries.must_not_collect: Note service tokens, direct investor conclusions, or full content unless explicitly authorized.
entries.production_gap: Real Notion/Youdao/Evernote account validation, real-user allowlist tuning, and Windows/Linux vault path validation.

entries.collects: Investment notes, review records, rules, checklists, valuation assumptions, thesis updates, decision frameworks, note-type surface, source-app surface, preview/full-content surface, and investment note boundary proof.
entries.must_not_collect: Non-investment notes as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: Real note-corpus false-positive backtest and user-tuned note-source policy validation.

entries.cli: SoulMirror loads collectors/generic/ticktick.yaml, AgentRunner invokes python <SKILL_DIR>/scripts/collect_for_soulmirror.py, and the daemon writes lake/ticktick/events.jsonl.
entries.collects: TickTick/Dida task titles, projects, status, start/due/completion times, recurrence, reminders, and raw task fields through the SoulMirror snapshot diff path. Offline JSON/ZIP export conversion remains available as an auxiliary test/import path with source-app/project/tag/keyword scope-policy audit.
entries.must_not_collect: OAuth tokens in output or direct investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Deploy and validate managed OAuth broker, then run real recurring task/timezone backtest.

entries.collects: Calendar events, start/end time, all-day flag, duration, multi-day status, invalid time ranges, same-calendar conflict summary, location, meeting links, organizer, attendees, recurrence, reminders, platform coverage, source-platform/calendar/attendee/keyword scope-policy audit, source audit, ZIP skip reasons, and path-level parse results.
entries.must_not_collect: Calendar account credentials or direct investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Real Apple/Google/Outlook/Feishu/DingTalk/WeCom/Tencent Meeting calendar validation.

entries.collects: Trading plans, research tasks, review reminders, earnings/event follow-ups, research meetings, risk checks, upstream source surface, reminder/time surface, calendar time-quality surface, task/calendar scope-policy boundary, task/calendar boundary proof, and execution discipline signals.
entries.must_not_collect: Unrelated personal tasks as investor facts.
entries.production_gap: Real task/calendar backtest and threshold tuning.

entries.collects: WeChat favorite/read/share/saved-file actions, article titles, source accounts and source-account types, URLs, article IDs, tags, text previews, favorite reasons, share targets, read duration/progress, symbols, engagement counters, source-account/source-account-type/action/tag/domain/keyword scope-policy audit, action coverage, behavior coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, ZIP member audit, and content policy.
entries.must_not_collect: WeChat secrets, unrelated article bodies as conclusions, or platform-wide public account scraping.
entries.production_gap: Real WeChat favorites/public-account stores and Windows/Linux path validation.

entries.collects: Investment public-account articles, saved/read/share/saved-file action surface, source account types, broker research, company fundamentals, market strategy, industry themes, valuation methods, portfolio cases, risk warnings, macro policy articles, URLs, article IDs, tags, text-preview availability, favorite reasons, share targets, read duration/progress, symbols, engagement counters, behavior boundary proof, and WeChat article boundary proof.

entries.production_gap: Real WeChat favorites/public-account stores, account/tag allowlists, action metadata validation, Windows/Linux path validation, and false-positive review.

entries.production_gap: Real app/account adapters, subscription stores, real Safari/macOS history samples, Windows/Linux history path validation, topic false-positive review, and platform inference on noisy exports.

entries.collects: Futu, Tiger, and IBKR assets, positions, executions, orders, cashflows, dividends, FX, margin, tax, settlement, multi-currency amount fields, account-boundary summary, currency/market summary, fee/tax/margin summary, cashflow activity summary, income return summary, order execution summary, broker/account/subtype/symbol/market/currency/keyword scope-policy audit, filtered-all readiness, unified brokerage-boundary proof, broker/trade-surface coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, and ZIP member audit.
entries.must_not_collect: Trading passwords, order mutation, community discussions, or complete brokerage-boundary claims without real validation.
entries.production_gap: Real Futu/Tiger/IBKR exports or read-only screens, broker-specific column maps, complete account-boundary proof, and multi-currency margin/tax validation.

entries.collects: Wind, Choice, iFinD, and Bloomberg workspaces, watchlists, searches, downloads, exports, templates, factors, datasets, fields, function codes, query terms, query parameters, export paths, row counts, workspace IDs, template IDs, object counts, workflow metadata, workflow topic summaries, workflow intensity summaries, terminal/activity/workspace/project/dataset/field/keyword scope-policy audit, filtered-all readiness, unified workflow-boundary proof, terminal/activity coverage, per-input source audit, skipped reasons, and ZIP member audit.

entries.collects: Weibo, Bilibili, and Xiaohongshu follows, likes, favorites, watch history, comments, shares, browser-history visits, source apps, visit/typed counts, browser transition types, domain-filtered URLs, creators, social influence topics, symbols, engagement counts, weak influence signals, platform/action/source-app/domain/creator/topic/keyword scope-policy audit, filtered-all readiness, platform/action/field coverage, social activity boundary proof, per-input source audit, skipped file reasons, and ZIP member audit.

entries.production_gap: Real platform exports, default creator/domain allowlists, social-topic false-positive review, and weak-evidence backtest.

entries.collects: Investment creator influence, attention sources, social influence topic summaries, platform/action summaries, corroboration candidates, and social influence boundary proof from social activity.
entries.must_not_collect: Standalone investment advice or conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Weak-evidence backtest against stronger trade/research sources.

entries.collects: Authorized QQ contacts, groups, messages, compact communication evidence, standard Lake events, manifest, field/filter audit, and explicit gap packages.
entries.must_not_collect: Passphrases in output, decrypted keys, unrelated raw dumps, or investment conclusions.
entries.production_gap: Current macOS passphrase capture limitation, real decrypted-store validation, and investor communication lens backtest.
